layman_headline: Crypto markets are scared and bleeding — no clear setup worth risking capital on right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a 'Fear' state with Bitcoin slipping below $63,000 and Bitcoin dominance at 56%, which means money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin. All of the coins on our watchlist have significant problems — some are overbought after huge runs, others are in clear downtrends with bearish chart patterns. None of them offer a clean entry with good risk-reward right now. The smartest move is to sit on the sidelines and wait for a better setup.
layman_action: Do nothing right now. Keep your cash ready. Wait for the fear to peak and for a coin to show a clear reversal signal with strong volume before jumping in.
expert_reasoning: Every candidate has disqualifying issues. DEXE and LIT are deeply overbought (RSI 77 and 72) after 84% and 55% 5-day runs respectively — chasing here is high-risk. KITE and GRASS have bearish chart structures with bearish engulfing/marubozu patterns. VELVET's risk/reward is terrible at 0.26x. ETHFI has the best chart bias (+0.60) but resistance is only 2.5% away with R/R of 0.11x — there's no trade there. JTO offers the most balanced profile with a pullback into support, above SMA20, and RSI in the middle zone, but the broader macro headwinds (high BTC dominance at 56%, Fear sentiment, leverage flush) make this a low-conviction environment for alt entries. Discipline says wait.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56% is crushing altcoin performance — capital rotation into alts hasn't begun
Asian session leverage flush signals continued deleveraging that could cascade into alts
No volume breakout signals present in any candidate — our highest-reliability signal type is absent
watch_list: BTC holding $62,000 support — a breakdown here would drag all alts significantly lower
Fear & Greed reaching 20 or below (extreme fear) would signal a stronger contrarian buy opportunity
JTO price action at the $0.60 support level — a bounce with volume confirmation there would be actionable
market_context: Bitcoin is consolidating near $62,700 after a leverage flush, with Fear & Greed at 28 and improving from a weekly low of 24.6. BTC dominance at 56% signals a risk-off environment for altcoins, though Bitcoin ETF inflows of $197M breaking an 8-week streak hint at potential stabilization.
context_banner: Market fear is improving but unconfirmed — discipline demands waiting for volume-confirmed setups rather than catching falling knives in a high-dominance BTC environment.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 28 and improving from 24.6 weekly average — fear is elevated but starting to lift, suggesting we're approaching but haven't reached a capitulation bottom.
Bitcoin ETFs drew $197M snapping an 8-week outflow streak — institutional interest returning is a positive macro signal but hasn't translated to alt strength yet.
DEXE (77) and LIT (72) are overbought — our reliable RSI signal says these are correction risks, not entries. JTO at 59 is the most balanced.
Bitcoin slipped below $63K in an Asian leverage flush — forced liquidations indicate fragile market positioning that could extend to alts.
No volume breakout signals detected across any candidate — our most reliable signal type (100% win rate, +13.4% avg return) is completely absent this cycle.
